-- 1 of 6 --

Circle of Awesome
!
Now I want to talk about the circle of awesome, because it’s just plain awesome.
!
This is the deal. I don’t want you thinking about just one launch.
!
Yes, we have to get that first launch under your belt. But I want you to think in terms of
sequences of launches.
!
This is how John Gallagher goes from food stamps to having a million dollar business.
This is how Susan Garrett as a complete newbie does that first launch and then does
hundreds of thousands of dollars. This is how I’ve built my business.
!
There’s a few different ways this can go, but I’m going to show you all of them, or most
of them at least. You can get creative if you want.
!
There’s this thing called a JV launch down here. JV launches you can make a lot of
money because you’re tapping into other people’s lists. JV means joint venture. You can
use affiliates or joint venture partners. Then they mail their lists about your launch.
!
What if you had a 10,000 person list, but you could find five joint venture partners and
each of those people had a 20,000 person list, and all of a sudden 100,000 people
between the five of them are being mailed to instead of just the 10,000 people on your
list. It gives you a universe that’s literally 10 times bigger than your universe with just
five partners. Something like that is not unusual.
!
The biggest launch I ever did before my first JV launch was an internal launch of
$110,000. My first JV launch was over $600,000, so it was a factor of 6X. My next joint
venture launch after that was almost $4,000,000, so that’s a factor of 40X over my
internal launches. So joint venture launches can be really great.
!
The thing is you don’t want your first launch to be a joint venture launch, because you
want to test your launch, you want to test your prelaunch content, you want to test
your sideways sales letter to make sure it converts before you ask partners to mail for
you. If those partners mail for you, you want to make a lot of money for them so they
will want to mail for you in the future.
!
That means that you don’t test out your launch on a JV launch.
!
First, you do an internal launch.
!
You do an internal launch and you figure out your offer, you figure out your
prelaunch content, you figure out the whole sequence, you figure out your
open cart sequence, you figure out how to take care of people after they buy
from you.
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 2
PLF_Module1v1.0

-- 2 of 6 --

!
With the circle of awesome what you do is you start off with the internal launch and
you test the process.
!
Maybe you have a list of 1,000 people. Let’s just say you have 1,000 people on your list.
You do this internal launch and you do, let’s say, $20,000 on that internal launch.
!
Then what you do is you go to your joint venture partners and you say, “Hey, I’ve got
this product. I only have 1,000 people on my list, but I was able to sell $20,000. That’s
$20 per name on my list. I can’t tell for sure whether these numbers will hold up, but if
you mail people into my launch then I’m paying you a 50% commission, if the numbers
hold up that means for every person that joins my list during this launch you’re going to
make $10.”
!
When you go to a partner with those kind of numbers and those kind of metrics, then it
makes it a lot easier to track the partners. Which $20,000 is awesome for most people.
You do that and then you go to the JV launch.
!
Now say you have five partners and each of those five partners has 20,000 people on
their list, so 100,000 people get mailed. Of those 100,000 people – I’m just making
numbers up here – let’s say 5,000 join your list. Now your list just increased from 1,000
to 6,000, you added 5,000 people onto your list. Now with 6,000 if those numbers held
up you might do $100,000 on this launch.
!
You just created this product once and you were able to do this $20,000 and then
another $100,000. Again, these numbers are not typical, I’m not making income claims,
I’m just coming up with examples to illustrate a point. You can see how that’s some
serious growth.
!
Now what you do? It’s great you made $120,000, but everyone who is in business is
always looking at what’s next, what’s the next step, how can we grow from here.
With this 6,000 person list, I have done launches of $100,000 to small lists like that.
Now you have a 6,000 person list, you’ve delivered this product here and you’re really
starting to nail it down. The beautiful thing is after people go through your launch you
get a lot of feedback on what they want next.
!
When you did that internal launch you had the prelaunch content, the PLC. In fact, you
had that sideways sales letter with the three videos. Well, guess what? You end up
reusing those.
!
That’s the beautiful thing when you go from an internal launch to a JV launch you can
almost always reuse your prelaunch content, in fact you want to. You have these
metrics, these numbers and results, that were based on this launch, this PLC, this
sideways sales letter, this sequence, so you want to be able to go to partners and say,
“This is a tested sequence, this thing makes money.”
!
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 3
PLF_Module1v1.0

-- 3 of 6 --

!
!
The beautiful thing is in that process there’s this launch conversation.
!
As you deliver it a second time down in your joint venture launch you have this launch
conversation. That means that you’re getting tons and tons of feedback from the
market. It’s just that simple. People are going to comment on your blog posts, they’re
writing emails back to you, they’re probably writing about you in social media.
!
You’re getting all this feedback and part of that feedback is they’re going to tell you
what product they want next. That especially happens after you start to deliver your
product. Now you’re delivering your product. If you do it like I do and you have a
community and you solicit comments, you get people having a conversation within the
product, they’re going to tell you what the next product is.
!
Then you go around and you create that next product. What happens now though is
when you go to launch the product this time around you don’t have 1,000 people on
your list, you have those 6,000 people on your list.
!
What’s your launch do this time? The first time we did $20 per name. Maybe this next
time, maybe because you got all that feedback from the market in your prelaunch
content and your product, maybe you make a much better offer and maybe you do $30
per subscriber this time around. Again, I’m making these numbers up, just illustrating a
point. If you did that you would be at $180,000. Even if you did $20 per subscriber here
it would be $120,000. You can see it’s a quantum leap.
!
Now you create that second product, you do that internal launch to your 6,000, you
bring in $180,000, and now what do you do with that second product? You’re going to
come around and do a JV launch. Of course this time your second time on a JV launch
these partners made a bunch of money, so now it’s usually easier to get more partners
and more affiliates to promote you the second time around. The first they’re just not
sure because it’s like you’re an unknown quantity. This time you’re a proven quantity. So
who knows what the numbers are this time.
!
Maybe you go from a 6,000 person list to a 15,000 person list. Who knows what your
launch does… maybe this time it does $300,000. Again, I’m just making numbers up.
Now what happens during this PLC and the launch conversation for the second product?
!
Here we have that PLC the second time around, there’s your sideways sales letter,
you’re starting to cook with gas now. You’ve been through two internal launches, you’re
going through your second launch here, you’ve built up 15,000 people. Now what
happens is you get more ideas because the market just keeps on talking to you.
!
Are they going to get sick of products? No. No matter what you’re selling, no matter
what market you’re in, they want more than you’ll ever create. That’s the reality.
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 4

-- 4 of 6 --

I buy products about how to learn guitar, I have a whole shelf full and I still buy more.
It doesn’t matter. That’s the way pretty much every market, including whatever market
you’re in, is like.
!
This time you’re coming around, you’re doing your next internal launch to 15,000
people. Again, we’re just making numbers up, but you never know. This launch might
do $300,000. Then you can see you’re going to come back around, you’re going to have
even more proof that you’re delivering for your partners. You’re getting more and more
experienced at creating products, creating launches, and that is the circle of awesome
that just keeps on going around and around.
!
You’re never coming out with untested products.
!
You’re coming out with products that are responding to the market.
!
You’re going to your JV’s with proven launch sequences, so they know they’re going to
make money. It’s just a beautiful thing. You keep on serving your clients better and
better each time because you’re building up experience.
!
I just want to throw in one more little piece here...
!
Say you’re just starting out, you’re brand new and you don’t have that initial 1,000
people, you can’t do that initial list. That’s where the seed launch comes in.
!
The first time that I ever rolled out Product Launch Formula, I actually spoke about it
on stage then offered this product launch workshop.
!
That product launch workshop, because I’m not a pitchman, because I’m not great at
going on the stage and getting people all fired up to buy my product, I’m great at going
on stage and presenting but I wasn’t great at selling, I only got six people to buy.
!
Basically I gave a talk, then I said, “If you want to go to my workshop, buy it.” Only six
people bought it.
!
That’s a key point. First time I ever offered Product Launch Formula to teach product
launches, I had six people buy... I now have over 10,000 and I’ve done that
$20,000,000 in sales.
!
That shows how you can start with a very small seed launch. I did that first with six
people, I learned how to teach the product, then I went to straight to a JV launch
because I had a lot of experience with launches. That first launch I did $600,000 the
first time I rolled PLF out to the public. I built a list of about 15,000 people, and then I
just went from there.
Another way you could do it is you could do the seed launch over here. Do your initial
seed launch, build up that initial seed product, get that initial tiny little list that’s built
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 5
PLF_Module1v1.0

-- 5 of 6 --

through that seed launch process, and then go to an internal launch from there and
then take it to a JV launch.
!
There’s a lot of different ways, but these three can tie together. That’s why in this
course I’m teaching that seed launch first, then we’re going to go through the internal
launch and the JV launch, so you can totally get this circle of awesome and put it to use
in your business, because it is 100% awesome.
!
It’s this vortex of goodness, of momentum that builds in your business.
!
There you go, the circle of awesome.
!
!
!
